summary: My Stamps page split-screen stamp editor testing complete. Fixed critical bug: shape field not being saved to database. Fixed frontend auth header issue causing 403 errors. All features working: 3 stamp slots (Rectangle/Circle/Oval), 5 rectangle layouts, curved text for circle/oval, signature capture, address field, color selection, save/edit/delete.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/stamp-templates - Creates rectangle stamp with shape field
POST /api/stamp-templates - Creates circle stamp with address field
All 5 rectangle layouts work (horizontal, vertical, compact, logo_left, logo_right)
frontend_ui_tests: My Stamps page loads with 3 stamp slots (Rectangle, Circle, Oval)
Rectangle editor: split-screen layout with settings on left, preview on right
Rectangle editor: all 5 layout options (Wide, Tall, Square, QR Left, QR Right) change preview in real-time
Circle editor: curved text rendering (TLS VERIFIED at top, advocate name at bottom)
Circle editor: address field appears and renders on outer ring
Signature capture: modal opens, can draw signature, signature appears in preview
Color selection: changing brand color updates preview immediately
Save stamp: creates new stamp template, shows success toast
Edit existing stamp: clicking Edit loads existing settings
Delete stamp: removes stamp, shows success toast, updates progress

bugs_fixed.issue: Shape field not saved to database in POST /api/stamp-templates
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'shape': template.shape to template_data dict in create_stamp_template function

bugs_fixed.issue: Shape field not saved in PUT /api/stamp-templates/{id}
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'shape': template.shape to update_data dict in update_stamp_template function

bugs_fixed.issue: advocate_address field missing from StampTemplate model and CRUD
bugs_fixed.fix: Added advocate_address field to model, create, and update functions

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend 403 errors on stamp-templates API calls
bugs_fixed.fix: Fixed getAuthHeaders() usage - was using { headers: getAuthHeaders() } but getAuthHeaders() already returns { headers: {...} }

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added shape and advocate_address fields to stamp template CRUD
/app/backend/tests/test_stamp_editor.py - New test file for stamp editor
seed_data_creation: Test stamps created and cleaned up during testing. One rectangle stamp remains for user: bb617350-6e3b-41bf-915f-c173d6147350
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Stamps page fully functional. Split-screen stamp editor with settings on left, live preview on right. Supports 3 shapes (rectangle, circle, oval) with max 3 templates per user. Rectangle has 5 layouts (Wide/Tall/Square/QR Left/QR Right). Circle and oval have curved SVG text. Signature capture uses react-signature-canvas. All CRUD operations working.
